panels.title: System Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, health_score AS "Health" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit, one of the most important plant-stress metrics.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, state AS "State" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows the current controller or equipment state for this subsystem.

panels.title: Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.description: Shows current or recent operating cost for this subsystem.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, dli_today AS "DLI" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows daily light integral, the accumulated plant light for the day.

panels.title: Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, open_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current or recent alerts that need attention.

panels.title: Monthly Summary

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', ts)::date AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(temp_avg)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Temp (°F)",
  ROUND(AVG(vpd_avg)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg VPD",
  ROUND(AVG(rh_avg)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg RH (%)",
  ROUND(SUM(dli_today)::numeric / 30, 1) AS "Avg DLI",
  ROUND(AVG(co2_ppm)::numeric, 0) AS "Avg CO2 (ppm)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows month-level rollups for the main greenhouse climate and operating metrics.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_avg AS "Min"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_intake AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux * 0.0185 * 3600 / 1e6 AS "Reference DLI"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  $__time(date::timestamptz),
  dli_final AS "DLI (mol/m²)"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND dli_final IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux AS "Outdoor Illuminance (lx)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), MAX(gdd_cumulative) AS "GDD"
FROM v_gdd
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Solar Noon Altitude (Monthly)
panels.description: Peak sun angle by month — shows seasonal solar arc driving light and heat

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('month', ts)::timestamptz AS time,
  ROUND(MAX(solar_altitude_deg)::numeric, 1) AS "Peak Altitude",
  ROUND(AVG(solar_altitude_deg) FILTER (WHERE solar_altitude_deg > 0)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Daytime Altitude"
FROM climate
WHERE solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('month', ts)::timestamptz AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN solar_altitude_deg > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 24, 1) AS "Daylight Hours"
FROM climate
WHERE solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_heat1_min AS "value"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat1_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), cycles_heat1 AS "Heat 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_heat1 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_intake AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_heat1_min AS "value"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat1_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_intake AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_fan1_min AS "value"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan1_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Monthly Summary

targets.rawSql: SELECT month_start, days, temp_avg, vpd_avg, dli_avg, stress_hours_vpd_high, total_water_gal, total_cost FROM v_monthly_summary ORDER BY month_start DESC LIMIT 6

panels.description: Shows month-level rollups for the main greenhouse climate and operating metrics.
